rulings.Case Title: RAYMOND GENE BENNETT et al VS. 3M COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 24, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Pacific Gas & Electric Company¿s motion to strike is off calendar based on the notice of plaintiff¿s death filed on May 9. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: RAYMOND GENE BENNETT et al VS. 3M COMPANY et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 24, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 1. Defendant Pacific Gas & Electric Company¿s demurrer is off calendar based on the notice of plaintiff¿s death filed on May 9. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: RONALD DENNIS VS. ASBESTOS CORPORATION LIMITED et al
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 24, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 2. Defendant Bridgestone Americas Tire Operations, LLC¿s general demurrer to plaintiff¿s complaint is sustained with 10 days leave to amend to allow plaintiff the opportunity, if he is able to do so, to state facts sufficient to show that his claim is not barred by the applicable statute of limitations. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: THOMAS METCALF et al VS. PARKER-HANNIFIN CORPORATION
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Strike Punitive Damages And Loss Of Consortium From Plaintiffs' Complaint For Personal Injury And Loss Of Consortium Asbestos
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 24, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 3. Defendant John Crane Inc.¿s motion to strike punitive damages and the loss of consortium case of action is off calendar as moot given the tentative ruling on defendant¿s demurrer. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Case Title: THOMAS METCALF et al VS. PARKER-HANNIFIN CORPORATION
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 24, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 3. Defendant John Crane Inc.¿s general demurrer to plaintiffs¿ complaint is sustained with 10 days leave to amend to give plaintiffs an opportunity, if they are able to do so, to allege facts sufficient to meet the requirements of Bockrath. = (220/HEK)

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO DISMISS FOR FAILURE TO PROSCECUTE
rulings.Rulings: On Asbestos Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, May 24, 2011 in Department 220 at 9:30 a.m., Line 4. Defendant Lipe Automation Corp.¿s motion to dismiss for failure to prosecute pursuant to C.C.P. §§ 583.310 & 583.360 is granted. No opposition filed. Hearing required unless counsel for defendant informs Mr. Henthorn of this tentative ruling and he states that he does not wish to contest. = (220/HEK)
